items.title: Simmons retires as Bronco: 'My heart, my home'
items.body_text: Two-time Pro Bowl safety Justin Simmons announced Wednesday that he is retiring from the NFL as a member of the Broncos.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Sources: NFL assigns ref crews as CBA progresses
items.body_text: The NFL distributed crew assignments to referees this week amid indications of continued progress toward a deal on a new collective bargaining agreement with the NFL Referees Association, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Kevin Seifert

items.title: Texans, LB Al-Shaair agree to 3-year extension
items.body_text: The Texans and linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair have reached agreement on a three-year, $54 million extension, according to NFL Network.
items.author: DJ Bien-Aime

items.title: Rooney explains rationale behind Rodgers tender
items.body_text: Art Rooney II remains confident Aaron Rodgers will be the team's QB in 2026, but he told NFL Network the club applied the rarely used UFA tender on him to make sure it would secure a compensatory pick "in the unlikely event he goes somewhere else."
items.author: Brooke Pryor

items.title: Source: Veteran DT Harris expected to join Giants
items.body_text: The New York Giants are expected to sign veteran defensive tackle Shelby Harris to a one-year deal, a source told ESPN.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Sources: Brzezinski seeks full-time Vikes GM job
items.body_text: Vikings interim general manager Rob Brzezinski has expressed interest in the permanent job as the team begins its search process this week, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Kevin Seifert

items.title: Source: Jets considering Russell Wilson for QB2
items.body_text: The Jets, exploring the veteran backup quarterbacks available, had Russell Wilson in for a visit late Monday night, a source told ESPN's Rich Cimini.
items.author: Rich Cimini

items.title: Nix had second procedure on ankle, sources say
items.body_text: Bo Nix had a second procedure on his surgically repaired right ankle last week, and his participation in the Broncos' offseason program, which is set to begin Monday, could be limited, sources said.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: 💍 J.J. McCarthy marries his longtime girlfriend
items.body_text: The Minnesota Vikings quarterback proposed to his longtime girlfriend in January 2024.
items.author: ESPN staff
